# mode

**Instance Property**

Specifies the browser display mode.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var mode: IKDeviceBrowserViewDisplayMode { get set }
```

## Discussion

The supported display modes are defined in [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKDeviceBrowserViewDisplayMode]
